P4PORT.agent_msg: Ask the user for their Perforce server address and write it to {config_path} as the P4PORT field

P4USER.agent_msg: Ask the user for their Perforce username and write it to {config_path} as the P4USER field

OPENAI_API_KEY.user_msg: OpenAI API key (set 'none' if not used)
OPENAI_API_KEY.agent_msg: Ask the user for their OpenAI API key. 'none' is acceptable. Write to {config_path} as OPENAI_API_KEY

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.user_msg: OpenRouter API key (set 'none' if not used)
OPENROUTER_API_KEY.agent_msg: Ask the user for their OpenRouter API key. 'none' is acceptable. Write to {config_path} as OPENROUTER_API_KEY

DEFAULT_AGENT.agent_msg: Ask the user which agent to use for reviews. Write to {config_path} as DEFAULT_AGENT
